import io

mut line_num = 1
mut line = io.read_line()
while true
  match line
  when None
    line = None
  when Some(text)
    print("#{line_num}: #{text}")
    line_num = line_num + 1
    line = io.read_line()
  end
  match line
  when None
    line_num = 0
  when Some(_)
    line_num = line_num
  end
  if line_num == 0
    line_num = line_num
  end
end
